Uses of Class
io.mangoo.exceptions.MangooSchedulerException

  • Packages that use MangooSchedulerException 
    Package Description
    io.mangoo.scheduler  

    • Uses of MangooSchedulerException in io.mangoo.scheduler

      Methods in io.mangoo.scheduler that throw MangooSchedulerException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Scheduler.changeState​(String jobName)
      Changes the state of a normally running job from pause to resume or resume to pause
      void Scheduler.deleteJob​(String name)
      Delete a job by a given name
      void Scheduler.executeJob​(String jobName)
      Executes a single Quartz Scheduler job right away only once
      List<org.quartz.JobKey> Scheduler.getAllJobKeys()
      Retrieves a list of all JobKeys from the Quartz Scheduler
      List<Job> Scheduler.getAllJobs()
      Retrieves a list of all jobs and their current status
      org.quartz.JobKey Scheduler.getJobKey​(String name)
      Retrieves a JobKey by it given name
      boolean Scheduler.isStarted()
      Checks if the scheduler is initialized and started
      void Scheduler.pauseJob​(String name)
      Pauses a job by a given name
      void Scheduler.resumeJob​(String name)
      Resume a job by a given name
      void Scheduler.schedule​(org.quartz.JobDetail jobDetail, org.quartz.Trigger trigger)
      Adds a new job with a given JobDetail and Trigger to the scheduler
      void Scheduler.shutdown()  
      void Scheduler.standby()  
      void Scheduler.start()
